sub_mechanisms: M_1: define bounded linear functional φ on past-context subspace
M_2: apply Hahn-Banach extension to obtain Φ on full context
M_3: compute |Φ(token)| for each cached token
M_4: drop cached tokens with |Φ(token)| < ε threshold
stripped_llm_application: Define a bounded linear functional that scores past-context tokens by 'essential info'; extend this functional to the full context via a norm-preserving construction; drop cached tokens whose extended-functional value is below ε. Norm-preserving guarantees essential-info is retained exactly.
novelty_claim_stripped: KVzip/CompAct/MemoryLLM compress via SVD or quantization; this candidate uses Hahn-Banach norm-PRESERVING functional extension as the conservation law.
